assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 3): Long-Context Clinical LM vs. TF-IDF

Rigorous design. Patient-level split. Equal tuning with per-label thresholds. Sliding-window pooling. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 3): Long-Context Clinical LM vs. TF-IDF

Fiscal-year subgroup analysis for code vintage effects. MDC monitoring. Single-use test set policy. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 3): Long-Context Clinical LM vs. TF-IDF

Design is methodologically strong throughout. Equal per-label threshold optimization is the key fairness control. Test set evaluated exactly once.

Verdict: defense_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3): eval_scenario_194

All three: defense_wins. Unanimous across all runs.

Verdict: defense_wins
